title: SaveMyKeybinds
description: Allows you to save and load keybind presets
body:
# SaveMyKeybinds

SaveMyKeybinds lets you save and load presets of your Keybinds, allowing you to quickly swap lots of different keybinds at once. Presets are stored in a `savemykeybinds` folder in your `.minecraft`, so you can also share your presets with your friends and use theirs! 

## Compatability
- Supports Controlling
- Will support Amecs in the future
  - For now it wont break but wont load modifier keys either
- I may release a forge version sometime in the future

### A note about Fabric API

This mod does not *technically* require Fabric API, but translations will stay as raw keys without the resource loader module. Just install Fabric API.
